profile.tagline: PhD Candidate at FEUP | Researcher at INESC TEC
profile.bio: PhD candidate at the Faculty of Engineering, University of Porto, and researcher at INESC TEC. My work focuses on sequential decision-making applied to management science problems.

musicIntro: Music is my second job and a big part of my identity. Alongside research, I compose, perform, and release projects as a solo artist and with my band.

professionalExperience.details: Developed a Lean Six Sigma Green Belt project to increase operations data reliability and integrity across data collection, processing, and exportation.

professionalExperience.details: Developed a Lean Six Sigma Green Belt project to increase operations data reliability and integrity across data collection, processing, and exportation.

researchExperience.title: PEER (The hyPEr ExpeRt collaborative AI assistant)
researchExperience.details: Focuses on putting the user at the center of the AI design, development, deployment, and evaluation pipeline for mixed human-AI initiatives on complex sequential decision-making problems.

researchExperience.title: TRUST-AI (Transparent, Reliable and Unbiased Smart Tool for AI)
researchExperience.details: Involves human intelligence in the discovery process so that AI and humans work together to find effective, comprehensible, and generalizable solutions.
